reason: The remediation only requires editing /etc/systemd/logind.conf to add or modify StopIdleSessionSec under the [Login] section and restarting the systemd-logind service. This is a standard STIG hardening step, does not affect authentication mechanisms, networking, or filesystem layout, and carries minimal risk of lockout or service disruption.
estimated_impact: Potential termination of active but idle user sessions; Requires service restart which may briefly interrupt session handling
